name: io.github.NickCirv/engram
description: EngramX — the cached context spine for AI coding agents. 9 built-in providers + any MCP server as a 10-line plugin, pre-mortem mistake-guard, bi-temporal mistake memory, Anthropic Auto-Memory bridge, SSE streaming packets, dual-emit AGENTS.md+CLAUDE.md. 89.1% measured real-world token savings (reproducible bench). Local SQLite, zero cloud.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional auth bearer token for the HTTP server. Auto-generated at ~/.engram/http-server.token on first run if unset.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_MISTAKE_GUARD
environmentVariables.description: Pre-mortem warnings on Edit/Write/Bash. Set to '1' for permissive (warn via additionalContext), '2' for strict (deny with reason). Unset = off, zero overhead.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_ANTHROPIC_MEMORY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to Claude Code's Auto-Memory MEMORY.md. Defaults to ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/memory/MEMORY.md.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_MCP_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to the mcp-providers.json that declares plugin MCP servers. Defaults to ~/.engram/mcp-providers.json.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_NO_UPDATE_CHECK
environmentVariables.description: Disable passive update notice on CLI invocation. Set to '1' to silence. Auto-disabled when $CI is set.
